steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content:
The first sentence describes the tension Dillard observes (delicate fins vs. unsettling reproductive habits) and that she struggles to reconcile these juxtapositions.

The second sentence states her final synthesis: intricacy and harshness are inextricably linked.

This is a wrap-up of the whole discussion.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content:
Ultimately signals a final conclusion or end-state — exactly fitting Dillard's final reconciliation. To that end implies a purposeful means; Hence implies a tight logical consequence; Moreover simply adds another point. Ultimately best captures the resolution.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
